headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.tailwindcss.com https://www.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.tailwindcss.com https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseio.com wss://*.firebaseio.com https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com http://127.0.0.1:9199; media-src 'self' https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com http://127.0.0.1:9199; frame-ancestors 'none'
